#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

int32_t read_int32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path);
    if (buffer.error()) {
        return 0; // Return default value if file opening fails
    }

    buffer.read(&value);
    
    if (buffer.error()) {
        return 0; // Return default value if read operation fails
    }
    
    return value;
}

float read_float_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path);
    if (buffer.error()) {
        return 0.0f; // Return default value if file opening fails
    }
    
    float value;
    buffer.read(&value);
    
    if (buffer.error()) {
        return 0.0f; // Return default value if read operation fails
    }
    
    return value;
}
```</answer>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {

    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    buffer.read(&header);
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    stream << packet.packet_id;
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> temp_buffer(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(temp_buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    CompactPacket packet;
    stream >> packet.packet_id;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.tags);
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(packet.data);

    return packet;
}
```</answer>

#include <cstring>

Header peek_header_without_reading(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;

    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        if (adaptor.is_reading()) {
            adaptor & sensor_id;
            // Read the size of the temperatures vector
            uint32_t size;
            adaptor & size;
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(size);
            temperatures.resize(size);
            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                adaptor & temp;
                hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            }
            adaptor & pressure;
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
        } else {
            adaptor & sensor_id;
            // Write the size of the temperatures vector as a uint32_t in little-endian
            auto size = static_cast<uint32_t>(temperatures.size());
            auto converted_size = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(size, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor & converted_size;
            for (auto temp : temperatures) {
                auto converted = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
                adaptor & converted;
            }
            auto converted_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor & converted_pressure;
        }
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    // Create a buffer (vector of uint8_t)
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer using init_empty_t
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer, hexi::init_empty_t{});
    // Create a binary_stream with the buffer_adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    // Call the stream's serialise method with the data
    stream.serialise(data);
    return buffer;
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the input buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    // Create a binary_stream with the buffer_adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    // Create a MeasurementData object
    MeasurementData data;
    // Call the stream's deserialise method with the object
    stream.deserialise(data);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a binary_stream from the buffer

    uint32_t sensor_id;
    stream.read(&sensor_id);
    // Skip the remaining data
    stream.skip(buffer.size() - stream.total_read());
    return {sensor_id, sensor_name};
}
